database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name "Iulia" .
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?detailed_comments
WHERE {
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?detailed_comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(p1:Paper)
WHERE p.first_name = "Iulia"
RETURN p1.ID AS paper
SELECT reviews, ID as review_id, has_detailed_comments FROM Review WHERE reviews IN (1037)

2:
In their paper 'ZSWC-2015' the authors discuss ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular

The paper "ZSWC-2015" is mainly about ZSWC-2015.
This says about all about both its strong and weak suits.
However, the reviewer would like to highlight ZSWC-2015 in particular

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有作者名为‘Iulia’的人员所撰写的论文，返回论文ID、作者姓名和论文标题。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[r:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE author.first_name = 'Iulia'
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id, author.first_name AS first_name, author.last_name AS last_name, paper.title AS paper_title

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的论文ID列表，在MySQL的Review表中查询这些论文的详细评审意见。

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  FILTER (?first_name = "Aberthol")
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?detailed_comments
WHERE {
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?detailed_comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(p1:Paper)
RETURN p1.ID AS paper

理由：查询使用了正确的谓词 `conf:has_the_first_name` 和 `conf:contributes`，前缀为 `conf:`，查询逻辑与问题意图一致（通过作者名筛选论文），且未涉及摘要查询，无需检查谓词方向。

注意：LLM检查模式为advisory，结果仅供参考，不影响最终判定

❌ 查询不合规，请修复上述问题

repair_iterations.before_repair:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  FILTER (?first_name = "Aberthol")
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
}
repair_iterations.after_repair:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  FILTER (?first_name = "Aberthol")
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
}

=== LLM语义一致性检查 ===
一致性：不合规
理由：查询中使用了正确的谓词 `conf:has_the_first_name` 和 `conf:contributes`，但过滤条件 `FILTER (?first_name = "Aberthol")` 存在问题。根据本体信息，人名属性 `conf:has_the_first_name` 的值应为英文名字（如 "John"），而 "Aberthol" 不符合常见英文名字的格式，这可能导致查询结果为空或不符合预期。正确的做法应是通过 `FILTER (?person = <ID>)` 使用数字ID过滤，或确保过滤的字符串值符合数据集中实际的命名规范。

注意：LLM检查模式为advisory，结果仅供参考，不影响最终判定

=== 检查总结 ===
❌ 查询不合规，请修复上述问题

repair_details.final_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  FILTER (?first_name = "Aberthol")
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
}

repair_details.original_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?detailed_comments
WHERE {
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?detailed_comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}
repair_details.final_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?detailed_comments
WHERE {
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?detailed_comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有作者名为‘Aberthol’的人员所撰写的论文，返回论文ID、作者姓名和论文标题。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[r:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)
WHERE author.first_name = 'Aberthol'
RETURN paper.ID AS paper_id, author.first_name AS first_name, author.last_name AS last_name, paper.title AS paper_title

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name "Liselotte" .
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?review ?detailed_comments
WHERE {
  ?review rdf:type conf:Review .
  ?review conf:reviews ?paper .
  ?review conf:has_detailed_comments ?detailed_comments .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

1. 使用了错误的ID过滤方式：查询中使用了 `FILTER (?person = "ra")`，其中"ra"是字符串字面量，而不是数字ID。根据规则，正确的ID过滤方式应为 `FILTER (?person = number)`，即使用数字ID过滤实体。
2. 查询逻辑与问题意图不完全一致：自然语言问题要求查询"ra"所撰写的所有论文，但SPARQL查询中试图将变量`?person`与字符串"ra"进行相等比较，这不符合RODI数据集使用数字ID标识实体的惯例。正确的做法应是通过数据属性（如`conf:has_the_first_name`或`conf:has_the_last_name`）来匹配"ra"，或者问题本身应指定一个数字ID。

注意：LLM检查模式为advisory，结果仅供参考，不影响最终判定

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  FILTER (?conference_name = "Benguela")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_2>>))
}

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有在位置为'Benguela'的会议上发表论文的作者，返回作者ID、论文ID、论文标题和会议名称。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Benguela'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_location "Pago Pago" .
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_2>>))
}

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有在位置为'Pago Pago'的会议上发表论文的作者，返回作者ID、论文ID、论文标题和会议名称。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Pago Pago'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

subquery_metrics.query_question: 根据Neo4j返回的作者ID列表，在PostgreSQL中查询这些作者的姓名信息。

comparison_details.reason: Fallback判断: 匹配度基于标准化比较

subquery_metrics.query_question: 子查询3

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  FILTER (LCASE(?conference_name) = "annaba")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_2>>))
}

MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference)
RETURN p.ID AS paper

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有在位置为'Annaba'的会议上发表论文的作者，返回作者ID、论文ID、论文标题和会议名称。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Annaba'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person
WHERE {
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  FILTER (LCASE(?conference_name) = "escaldes")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

sparql_queries:

SELECT ?person

  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
  FILTER (LCASE(?conference_name) = "escaldes")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .

}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference), (p1:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)
RETURN p1.ID AS person

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有在位置为'Escaldes'的会议上发表论文的作者，返回作者ID、论文ID、论文标题和会议名称。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Escaldes'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  FILTER (LCASE(?conference_name) = "mascara")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_2>>))
}

repair_details.final_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  FILTER (LCASE(?conference_name) = "mascara")
}

repair_details.original_query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有在位置为'Mascara'的会议上发表论文的作者，返回作者ID、论文ID、论文标题和会议名称。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Mascara'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person
WHERE {
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_location "Andorra La Vella" .
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:contributes ?paper .
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?person ?first_name ?last_name
WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

converted_queries.converted_query:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:SUBMITTED_AT]->(c:Conference), (p1:Person)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)
WHERE c.location = "Andorra La Vella"
RETURN p1.ID AS person

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查找所有在位置为'Andorra La Vella'的会议上发表论文的作者，返回作者ID、论文ID、论文标题和会议名称。
query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Andorra La Vella'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

database_selections.original_sparql:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:is_submitted_at ?conference .
  ?conference rdf:type conf:Conference_volume .
  ?conference conf:has_a_name ?conference_name .
  FILTER (?conference_name = "Tirane")
}

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX conf: <http://conference#>

SELECT ?paper ?person
WHERE {
  ?paper rdf:type conf:Paper .
  ?paper conf:has_authors ?person .
  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  FILTER (?paper IN (<<SUBQUERY_1>>))
}

  ?person rdf:type conf:Person .
  ?person conf:has_the_first_name ?first_name .
  ?person conf:has_the_last_name ?last_name .
  FILTER (?person IN (<<SUBQUERY_2>>))
}

query_1.cypher_query:
MATCH (author:Person)-[a:AUTHORED]->(paper:Paper)-[s:SUBMITTED_AT]->(conf:Conference)
WHERE conf.location = 'Tirane'
RETURN DISTINCT author.ID AS person_id, paper.ID AS paper_id, paper.title AS paper_title, conf.name AS conference_name

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查询指定委员会YSWC 2015 Program Committee的所有成员，返回成员ID、姓名和委员会ID。
query_1.cypher_query: MATCH (member:Person)-[r:MEMBER_OF]->(c:Committee) WHERE c.name = 'YSWC 2015 Program Committee' RETURN member.ID AS person_id, member.first_name AS first_name, member.last_name AS last_name, c.ID AS committee_id;

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的成员ID列表，在PostgreSQL中查询这些成员的详细信息以及他们所属的所有委员会信息。
query_2.sql_query: SELECT p."ID" AS person_id, p."has_the_first_name" AS first_name, p."has_the_last_name" AS last_name, c."ID" AS committee_id, c."has_a_name" AS committee_name, c."TYPE" AS committee_type FROM "Person" p JOIN "has_members" hm ON p."ID" = hm."Committee_member" JOIN "Committee" c ON hm."Committee" = c."ID" WHERE p."ID" IN (585, 584, 403, 313, 48);

query_1.description: 在Neo4j中查询指定委员会XSWC 2015 Program Committee的所有成员，返回成员ID、姓名和委员会ID。
query_1.cypher_query: MATCH (member:Person)-[r:MEMBER_OF]->(c:Committee) WHERE c.name = 'XSWC 2015 Program Committee' RETURN member.ID AS person_id, member.first_name AS first_name, member.last_name AS last_name, c.ID AS committee_id;

query_2.description: 根据Neo4j返回的成员ID列表，在PostgreSQL中查询这些成员的详细信息以及他们所属的所有委员会信息。
query_2.sql_query: SELECT p."ID" AS person_id, p."has_the_first_name" AS first_name, p."has_the_last_name" AS last_name, c."ID" AS committee_id, c."has_a_name" AS committee_name, c."TYPE" AS committee_type FROM "Person" p JOIN "has_members" hm ON p."ID" = hm."Committee_member" JOIN "Committee" c ON hm."Committee" = c."ID" WHERE p."ID" IN (2185, 1815, 1210, 1120, 823, 158, 98);
